## Description

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration/build changes
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX improvements
- [ ] ♿ Accessibility improvements
- [ ] 🧪 Tests (adding missing tests or correcting existing tests)

## Game Levels Affected (if applicable)

- [ ] Level changes affect gameplay mechanics
- [ ] New level(s) added
- [ ] Existing level(s) modified
- [ ] Progress tracking affected

## Testing Checklist

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`npm run test:run`)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] TypeScript compilation succeeds (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Accessibility testing done (if UI changes)
